summary: Tested mobile selfie visibility fix and Request a Pro selfie workflow. Fixed missing selfie_url column in database that was causing 500 errors. All features verified working.

mobile_selfie_sticky_footer.description: UnifiedSpotDrawer.js has pb-24 padding and md:hidden sticky footer for mobile selfie controls

desktop_selfie_inline_controls.description: Desktop uses hidden md:flex class for inline selfie controls

request_pro_selfie_modal.description: RequestProSelfieModal.js exists with surfboard Pro Tip and update-selfie endpoint call

dispatch_request_model_selfie_url.description: DispatchRequest model has selfie_url field for surfer identification

dispatch_update_selfie_endpoint.description: /api/dispatch/{id}/update-selfie endpoint properly defined and returns selfie_url

map_page_integration.description: MapPage imports and renders RequestProSelfieModal with proper state management

unified_spot_drawer.description: UnifiedSpotDrawer opens on spot marker click, shows Live Now section

request_a_pro_button.description: Request a Pro button visible in map filter bar

missing_selfie_url_column.issue: Database dispatch_requests table was missing selfie_url column causing 500 errors
missing_selfie_url_column.fix_applied: Ran ALTER TABLE dispatch_requests ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS selfie_url VARCHAR(500) NULL

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile selfie sticky footer uses md:hidden class - visible on mobile, hidden on desktop
Desktop selfie controls use hidden md:flex - hidden on mobile, visible on desktop
Content area has pb-24 padding to make room for sticky footer on mobile
RequestProSelfieModal includes surfboard Pro Tip for identification
Backend dispatch routes properly include selfie_url in all relevant responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile selfie button visibility fixed with sticky footer approach. Database migration was needed to add selfie_url column to dispatch_requests table. All dispatch endpoints now include selfie_url field. RequestProSelfieModal is triggered after Pro accepts a request.

database_changes_applied.reason: Model had field but database column was missing
